import{j as e,O as W,f as ie,P as ae,S as le,T as oe}from"./index-BrdSe0CA.js";import{b as a}from"./charts-7pOQm6Mk.js";import{S as ne,C as ce,a as de}from"./ErpWorkspaceRuntime-BNE8Echs.js";import"./documents-Bhnlew-O.js";function he({services:q,customers:P,language:r,setServices:h,showToast:l,setActiveInvoice:Y}){const v=r==="ar",[n,u]=a.useState(null),[f,c]=a.useState(""),[R,j]=a.useState("maintenance"),[I,d]=a.useState(0),[L,x]=a.useState(0),[$,N]=a.useState(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]),[g,S]=a.useState(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]),[k,y]=a.useState("PENDING"),[O,w]=a.useState(""),[M,p]=a.useState(""),[D,T]=a.useState(""),[A,H]=a.useState("ALL"),[G,Q]=a.useState("ALL"),[o,C]=a.useState(new Date().getMonth()),[E,_]=a.useState(new Date().getFullYear());a.useEffect(()=>{const t=s=>{const i=s.detail;i&&(u(i),c(i.name),j(i.type),d(i.price),x(i.cost),N(i.dateReceived),S(i.dateDelivery),y(i.status),w(i.customerId||""),p(i.description||""))};return window.addEventListener("erp:edit-service",t),()=>window.removeEventListener("erp:edit-service",t)},[]);const U=t=>{if(t.preventDefault(),!f.trim()){l(r==="ar"?"يرجى إدخال اسم الخدمة!":"Please enter service name!","error");return}if(n)h(s=>s.map(i=>i.id===n.id?{...i,name:f,type:R,price:Number(I),cost:Number(L),dateReceived:$,dateDelivery:g,status:k,customerId:O||void 0,description:M}:i)),l(r==="ar"?"تم تحديث الخدمة بنجاح":"Service updated successfully"),u(null);else{const s={id:`srv_${Date.now()}`,name:f,type:R,price:Number(I),cost:Number(L),dateReceived:$,dateDelivery:g,status:k,customerId:O||void 0,description:M};h(i=>[s,...i]),l(r==="ar"?"تمت إضافة الخدمة المهنية بنجاح":"Professional service added")}c(""),j("maintenance"),d(0),x(0),N(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]),S(new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]),y("PENDING"),w(""),p("")},z=t=>{u(t),c(t.name),j(t.type),d(t.price),x(t.cost),N(t.dateReceived),S(t.dateDelivery),y(t.status),w(t.customerId||""),p(t.description||"")},B=t=>{window.confirm(r==="ar"?"هل أنت متأكد من حذف هذه الخدمة؟":"Are you sure you want to delete this service?")&&(h(s=>s.filter(i=>i.id!==t)),l(r==="ar"?"تم حذف الخدمة بنجاح!":"Service deleted!"))},K=t=>{const s=P.find(i=>i.id===t.customerId);Y({items:[{id:`srv-${t.id}`,name:t.name,type:"service",service:t,quantity:1,unitPrice:t.price}],customerName:s?s.name:r==="ar"?"زبون خدمات مهنية":"Services Client",customerPhone:s&&s.phone||"",invoiceNo:`SRV-${t.id.slice(-6).toUpperCase()}`,date:t.dateReceived,paymentMethod:"CASH",subtotal:t.price,discount:0,total:t.price})},X=t=>{const s=`${r==="ar"?"إشعار خدمة مهنية:":"Professional Service Notification:"}
🛠️ ${t.name}
💰 ${r==="ar"?"السعر:":"Price:"} $${t.price}
📅 ${r==="ar"?"تاريخ الاستلام:":"Received:"} ${t.dateReceived}
🚀 ${r==="ar"?"تاريخ التسليم المتوقع:":"Expected Delivery:"} ${t.dateDelivery}
📊 ${r==="ar"?"حالة التفيذ:":"Status:"} ${t.status}`;navigator.clipboard.writeText(s),l(r==="ar"?"تم نسخ تفاصيل الخدمة للمشاركة!":"Service details copied for sharing!")},V=q.filter(t=>{const s=t.name.toLowerCase().includes(D.toLowerCase())||t.description&&t.description.toLowerCase().includes(D.toLowerCase()),i=A==="ALL"||t.status===A,b=G==="ALL"||t.type===G;return s&&i&&b}),Z=new Date(E,o+1,0).getDate(),ee=new Date(E,o,1).getDay(),te=Array.from({length:Z},(t,s)=>s+1),re=Array.from({length:ee},(t,s)=>s),J=t=>{t==="prev"?o===0?(C(11),_(s=>s-1)):C(s=>s-1):o===11?(C(0),_(s=>s+1)):C(s=>s+1)},se=r==="ar"?["يناير","فبراير","مارس","أبريل","مايو","يونيو","يوليو","أغسطس","سبتمبر","أكتوبر","نوفمبر","ديسمبر"][o]:["January","February","March","April","May","June","July","August","September","October","November","December"][o];return e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-6 animate-fadeIn text-xs",dir:v?"rtl":"ltr",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"lg:col-span-4 bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-3xl border border-slate-200/80 space-y-4 shadow-3xs h-fit",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-between border-b pb-2",children:[e.jsxs("h4",{className:"font-extrabold text-slate-800 flex items-center gap-1.5 text-sm",children:[e.jsx(W,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5 text-violet-600"}),n?r==="ar"?"تعديل بيانات الخدمة":"Modify Service":r==="ar"?"إضافة بند خدمة مهنية جديدة":"Register New Service"]}),n&&e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{u(null),c(""),d(0),x(0),p("")},className:"text-xs font-bold text-rose-500 hover:underline cursor-pointer",children:r==="ar"?"إلغاء التعديل":"Cancel Edit"})]}),e.jsxs("form",{onSubmit:U,className:"space-y-3.5",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 mb-1 uppercase",children:r==="ar"?"اسم الخدمة المهنية *":"Service Item Name *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"text",required:!0,value:f,onChange:t=>c(t.target.value),placeholder:r==="ar"?"مثال: صيانة غسالة، شحن للرياض...":"e.g., Shipping to Riyadh, AC Service",className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-2.5 font-bold text-slate-850 focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500 transition shadow-3xs"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 mb-1 uppercase",children:r==="ar"?"تصنيف الخدمة":"Service Category"}),e.jsxs("select",{value:R,onChange:t=>j(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-2.5 font-bold text-slate-850",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"shipping",children:r==="ar"?"شحن وتوصيل":"Shipping"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"maintenance",children:r==="ar"?"صيانة وإصلاح":"Maintenance"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"craft",children:r==="ar"?"حرفة يدوية":"Handicraft"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"profession",children:r==="ar"?"مهنة حرة":"Freelance uppercase",children:r==="ar"?"الحالة الحالية":"Execution Status"}),e.jsxs("select",{value:k,onChange:t=>y(t.target.value),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-2.5 font-bold ⚙️"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"COMPLETED",children:r==="ar"?"جاهز للتسليم 🟢":"Ready 🟢"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"DELIVERED",children:r==="ar"?"تم التسليم والإنهاء 📦":"Delivered 📦"})]})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 mb-1 uppercase",children:r==="ar"?"سعر البيع للعميل ($) *":"Selling Price ($) *"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"number",min:"0",required:!0,value:I||"",onChange:t=>d(Number(t.target.value)),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-2.5 font-bold text-slate-850 font-mono"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block text-[10px] font-bold text-slate-500 mb-1 uppercase",children:r==="ar"?"تكلفة التنفيذ المباشرة ($)":"Execution Cost ($)"}),e.jsx("input",{type:"number",min:"0",value:L||"",onChange:t=>x(Number(t.target.value)),className:"w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-xl p-2.5 font-bold text-slate-850 font-mono"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-2 gap-2",children:[e.jsxs("div",{children:[e.jsx("label",{className:"block shadow-md cursor-pointer transition active:scale-95 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 text-xs",children:[e.jsx(ne,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5"}),n?r==="ar"?"حفظ التحديثات والبيانات":"Save Modifications":r==="ar"?"تسجيل وحفظ بند الخدمة":"Register Service"]})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"lg:col-span-8 space-y-6",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-3xl border items-center gap-1.5 text-sm",children:[e.jsx(ce,{className:"w-4.5 h-4.5 text-violet-600"}),r==="ar"?"أجندة ونيجة تسليم الخدمات المهنية والمصنعية":"Services Delivery Schedule Calendar"]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center gap-2",children:[e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>J("prev"),className:"bg-white hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 font-bold p-1 px-2.5 border rounded-lg cursor-pointer",children:"◄"}),e.jsxs("span",{className:"font-bold text-xs text-slate-850 font-sans min-w-24 text-center",children:[se," ",E]}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>J("next"),className:"bg-white hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 font-bold p-1 px-2.5 border rounded-lg cursor-pointer",children:"►"})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-7 gap-1 text-center font-bold",children:[(r==="ar"?["ح","ن","ث","ر","خ","ج","س"]:["Su","Mo","Tu","We","Th","Fr","Sa"]).map(t=>e.jsx("div",{className:"py-1 text-[10px] text-slate-400 uppercase font-bold",children:t},t)),re.map(t=>e.jsx("div",{className:"aspect-square bg-slate-100/40 rounded-lg"},`blank-${t}`)),te.map(t=>{const s=`${E}-${String(o+1).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(t).padStart(2,"0")}`,i=q.filter(F=>F.dateDelivery===s),b=i.some(F=>F.status!=="DELIVERED"),m=new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]===s;return e.jsxs("div",{onClick:()=>{T(s),l(r==="ar"?`تمت فلترة قائمة الخدمات المعروضة لتسليمات يوم: ${s}`:`Filtered list to delivery date: ${s}`)},className:`aspect-square p-1 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-between items-center transition cursor-pointer relative ${m?"bg-indigo-650 text-white shadow-xs":i.length>0?"bg-violet-50 hover:bg-violet-100 text-violet-750 border border-violet-200/70":"bg-white hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 border border-slate-100"}`,children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"text-[10px] font-black",children:t}),i.length>0&&e.jsx("span",{className:`text-[8px] px-1 py-0.2 rounded-full font-black ${b?"bg-amber-400 text-amber-950":"bg-emerald-500 text-white"}`,children:i.length})]},`day-${t}`)})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"bg-slate-50 p-5 rounded-3xl border border-slate-200/80 shadow-3xs space-y-4",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex flex-col sm:flex-row justify-between gap-3 items-start sm:items-center",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"relative flex-1 w-full",children:[e.jsx(ie,{className:`absolute top-2.5 w-4 h-4 text-slate-400 ${v?"right-3":"left-3"}`}),e.jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:r==="ar"?"🔍 ابحث عن بند خدمة بالاسم، الكود، أو تاريخ التسليم...":"🔍 Search service by name, description, date...",value:D,onChange:t=>T(t.target.value),className:`w-full bg-white border border-slate-250 rounded-xl py-2 text-xs focus:ring-1 focus:ring-violet-500 focus:outline-none text-slate-750 ${v?"pr-9 pl-3":"pl-9 pr-3"}`}),D&&e.jsx("button",{onClick:()=>T(""),className:`absolute top-2.5 hover:text-red-500 text-slate-400 ${v?"left-3":"right-3"}`,children:"✕"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center gap-2 w-full sm:w-auto overflow-x-auto pb-1 scrollbar-none",children:[e.jsxs("select",{value:A,onChange:t=>H(t.target.value),className:"bg-white border border-slate-250 rounded-xl p-1.5 px-3 font-bold text-slate-700 text-xs",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"ALL",children:r==="ar"?"كل الحالات":"All Status"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"PENDING",children:r==="ar"?"بانتظار البدء":"Pending"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"IN_PROGRESS",children:r==="ar"?"قيد التنفيذ":"In Progress"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"COMPLETED",children:r==="ar"?"جاهز للتسليم":"Ready"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"DELIVERED",children:r==="ar"?"تم التسليم":"Delivered"})]}),e.jsxs("select",{value:G,onChange:t=>Q(t.target.value),className:"bg-white border border-slate-250 rounded-xl p-1.5 px-3 font-bold text-slate-700 text-xs",children:[e.jsx("option",{value:"ALL",children:r==="ar"?"كل التصنيفات":"All Categories"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"shipping",children:r==="ar"?"شحن":"Shipping"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"maintenance",children:r==="ar"?"صيانة":"Maintenance"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"craft",children:r==="ar"?"حرفية":"Craft"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"profession",children:r==="ar"?"مهنية":"Profession"}),e.jsx("option",{value:"other",children:r==="ar"?"أخرى":"Other"})]})]})]}),V.length===0?e.jsxs("div",{className:"py-12 stroke-[1.5]"}),e.jsx("p",{className:"text-xs font-bold",children:r==="ar"?"لا توجد خدمات مهنية مسجلة":"No registered services matching filters"}),e.jsx("p",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-400 max-w-xs",children:r==="ar"?"قم بإضافة خدمة مهنية جديدة أو تعديل فلاتر البحث والتقويم.":"Add your first service item using the sidebar registry form."})]}):e.jsx("div",{className:"grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-3.5",children:V.map(t=>{const s=P.find(i=>i.id===t.customerId);return e.jsxs("div",{className:"bg-white p-4 rounded-2xl border border-slate-200 shadow-3xs relative overflow-hidden flex flex-col justify-between space-y-3",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-1.5",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex justify-between items-start gap-1",children:[e.jsx("h5",{className:"font-extrabold text-slate-850 text-xs line-clamp-1",children:t.name}),e.jsx("span",{className:`text-[8px] font-black uppercase px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full ${t.status==="COMPLETED"?"bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800":t.status==="DELIVERED"?"bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800":t.status==="IN_PROGRESS"?"bg-amber-100 text-amber-850":"bg-slate-100 text-slate-600"}`,children:t.status==="COMPLETED"?r==="ar"?"جاهز 🟢":"Ready 🟢":t.status==="DELIVERED"?r==="ar"?"مكتمل 📦":"Delivered 📦":t.status==="IN_PROGRESS"?r==="ar"?"قيد العمل ⚙️":"Working ⚙️":r==="ar"?"انتظار ⏱️":"Pending ⏱️"})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap",children:[e.jsx("span",{className:"bg-violet-50 text-violet-700 text-[9px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md border border-violet-100",children:t.type==="shipping"?r==="ar"?"شحن":"Shipping":t.type==="maintenance"?r==="ar"?"صيانة":"Maintenance":t.type==="craft"?r==="ar"?"حرفة":"Craft":t.type==="profession"?r==="ar"?"مهنة":"Profession":r==="ar"?"خدمة أخرى":"Other"}),s&&e.jsxs("span",{className:"bg-slate-100 text-slate-700 text-[9px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-md",children:["👤 ",s.name]})]}),t.description&&e.jsx("p",{className:"text-[10px] text-slate-450 font-medium leading-relaxed bg-slate-50 p-2 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 line-clamp-2",children:t.description})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"pt-2 border-t border-slate-100 flex justify-between items-center text-[10px]",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"space-y-0.5",children:[e.jsxs("div",{className:"text-slate-400 font-medium",children:[r==="ar"?"الاستلام:":"Recv:"," ",e.jsx("span",{className:"font-mono text-slate-700 font-bold",children:new Date(t.dateReceived).toLocaleDateString()})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"text-violet-600 font-bold",children:[r==="ar"?"التسليم:":"Delv:"," ",e.jsx("span",{className:"font-mono",children:new Date(t.dateDelivery).toLocaleDateString()})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"text-right",children:[e.jsxs("span",{className:"text-xs font-black text-slate-800 block font-mono",children:["$",t.price.toFixed(2)]}),t.cost>0&&e.jsxs("span",{className:"text-[9px] text-slate-400 block font-mono",children:["Cost: $",t.cost.toFixed(2)]})]})]}),e.jsxs("div",{className:"flex items-center justify-end gap-1.5 pt-2 border-t border-slate-100 flex-wrap",children:[e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>{const i=t.status==="PENDING"?"IN_PROGRESS":t.status==="IN_PROGRESS"?"COMPLETED":t.status==="COMPLETED"?"DELIVERED":"PENDING";h(b=>b.map(m=>m.id===t.id?{...m,status:i}:m)),l(r==="ar"?`تم تحديث الحالة إلى: ${i}`:`Status updated to: ${i}`)},className:"bg-slate-100 hover:bg-slate-200 text-slate-700 font-bold py-1 px-2 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition text-[9px]",title:r==="ar"?"اضغط للترقية السريعة لحالة التنفيذ والتسليم":"Click to step status",children:r==="ar"?"تحديث الحالة 🔄":"Progress 🔄"}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>K(t),className:"bg-indigo-50 hover:bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-700 font-bold p-1 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition border border-indigo-100",title:r==="ar"?"طباعة إيصال الفاتورة المخصصة للخدمة":"Print service receipt",children:e.jsx(ae,{className:"w-3.5 h-3.5"})}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>X(t),className:"bg-amber-50 hover:bg-amber-100 text-amber-700 font-bold p-1 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition border border-amber-100",title:r==="ar"?"مشاركة تفاصيل الخدمة":"Share service details",children:e.jsx(le,{className:"w-3.5 h-3.5"})}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>z(t),className:"bg-emerald-50 hover:bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-700 font-bold p-1 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition border border-emerald-100",title:r==="ar"?"تعديل الخدمة":"Edit service",children:e.jsx(de,{className:"w-3.5 h-3.5"})}),e.jsx("button",{type:"button",onClick:()=>B(t.id),className:"bg-rose-50 hover:bg-rose-100 text-rose-700 font-bold p-1 rounded-lg cursor-pointer transition border border-rose-100",title:r==="ar"?"حذف الخدمة":"Delete service",children:e.jsx(oe,{className:"w-3.5 h-3.5"})})]})]},t.id)})})]})]})]})}export{he as ServicesScreen};
